\caption{Island lengths of the \num{46} dual-island DP3 epitopes, the input to the per-island design run (Section~\ref{sec:perisland}). An island marked $^\dagger$ is a single residue and is skipped (it cannot be presented alone); the epitope's other island is still scaffolded.
